creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Rene Ladan from comment #1)

Cool! I suppose that once we get a yes from the current maintainers, the remaining items are going to be:

- Create a wiki page for the Samba team
- Create the freebsd-samba@ alias
- Subscribe the team members to the alias
- Change the maintainer of the ports to freebsd-samba@

Am I missing anything?
